unit_description: Grand Sky Suite ADA: climate-controlled glamping suite with panoramic windows, king bed, en-suite bath, private patio; ADA-accessible. 6930 E Rosilda Springs Rd.
description: Backland Luxury Nature Resort — a luxury eco-resort on 160 private acres at ~7,000 ft elevation near Williams, AZ (20 minutes from town, ~1 hr 10 min to Grand Canyon South Rim). Dark-sky lodging surrounded by Kaibab National Forest with climate-controlled glamping suites (panoramic windows, king beds, en-suite baths, private patios). On-site: 8-acre pond with beach (kayak/paddleboard), farm-to-table restaurant, spa tent, stargazing, trails, nightly fire pits. Last 8 miles via scenic Forest Service road (most vehicles; not motorcycles or ultra-low clearance). Booking: travelbackland.com.

Collective Governors Island is a distinctive glamping retreat located just a short ferry ride from New York City, offering a serene escape amidst 172 acres of car-free parkland. The property features 29 upscale tents and private suites, with accommodations that boast stunning skyline views and refreshing harbor breezes. Guests can enjoy key amenities such as seasonal dining at Three Peaks Lodge, sunset cocktails, and fireside evenings, providing a perfect setting for relaxation and reconnection. Unique to this retreat is its proximity to the city while offering a tranquil environment that feels worlds away, complete with activities like biking, wellness sessions, and live music events. Open seasonally from May to October, Collective Governors Island is ideal for those seeking a peaceful getaway with the convenience of city access.

description: Collective Retreats Governors Island offers a luxurious glamping experience just an eight-minute ferry ride from New York City. description: Open Sky Zion offers an unparalleled luxury glamping experience just minutes from the breathtaking landscapes of Zion National Park. Guests can indulge in safari-style canvas camps that blend seamlessly with the natural surroundings, providing a unique connection to the wilderness while enjoying complete privacy and opulent amenities. The property features a full-service farm-to-table restaurant, Black Sage, where renowned Chef Charles Parcell crafts exquisite dishes using fresh, local ingredients. This off-the-grid retreat also offers curated experiences such as scenic hiking, stargazing, and wellness activities, making it the perfect getaway for adventure seekers and nature enthusiasts. Embrace the harmony of luxury and nature at Open Sky Zion, where every moment invites rejuvenation and exploration.
